assessment.note: Describes a low-stimulus, unstretched state, indicating mild negative wellbeing.

new_queue.label: Stretch opportunities
new_queue.name: What would actually stretch you right now — is there a project or area you want to dive into?
new_queue.description: Identifies potential areas for growth and engagement that could address current lack of stretch.

new_queue.label: Priority alignment
new_queue.name: Do you feel aligned with the team’s current priorities?
new_queue.description: Checks alignment with current team priorities and any potential misalignment.

new_queue.label: Energy sustainability
new_queue.name: Is the current workload sustainable for you?
new_queue.description: Gauges whether the workload is sustainable and not leading to burnout.
